impact: This gives the PP&D daemon deterministic parser-clean coverage for repeated checkbox-178 syntax_preflight failures, proving broad source-plus-fixture-plus-test retries are rejected while a single parser-bearing file or daemon repair file remains allowed.
summary: Add focused retry-scope unittest for checkbox-192.
target_task: Task checkbox-192: Add one parser-clean daemon retry-scope helper or unittest proving that two syntax_preflight failures on checkbox-178 reject source-plus-fixture-plus-test bundles and allow only one parser-bearing file or one daemon repair file.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
